submission.name: WearEdge OPEA Manufacturing Five-Agent Suite
submission.product_shape: Docker-runnable OPEA Manufacturing Agent Suite with Web Demo Console, API, scorecard, and M400/Android deployment-front-end evidence

official_opea_references.name: OPEA Overview
official_opea_references.used_for: Gateway, microservice, and megaservice architecture alignment

official_opea_references.name: GenAI Microservices
official_opea_references.used_for: Microservice categories for LLM, RAG, guardrails, and orchestration

official_opea_references.name: OPEA TEI Embedding Microservice
official_opea_references.used_for: Official TEI embedding component profile with TEI_EMBEDDING_ENDPOINT, OPEA_TEI_EMBEDDING, and /v1/embeddings

official_opea_references.name: GenAIEval
official_opea_references.used_for: Evaluation artifact compatibility boundary: dataset, runner, metrics, benchmark evidence, and pass/fail summary

bonus_evidence.pull_request_checks: DCO, pre-commit.ci, dependency-review, get-test-matrix, get-test-case, and compose-test passed on 2026-05-28.
bonus_evidence.claim_boundary: Public RFC issue and official TEI update comment are posted upstream. A real upstream PR is open and CI-green at opea-project/GenAIExamples#2462. The PR is not merged yet.
The article and video asset are public in GitHub, and copy-ready external-platform article/video metadata are included. Add a Medium/LinkedIn/Dev.to/YouTube/Bilibili URL after external publication.

bonus_evidence.cloud_run: Google Cloud C3 c3-standard-4 in us-central1-a, single node, 4 vCPU, 16 GiB RAM, no GPU, Intel Xeon Platinum 8481C, temporary VM deleted after run
bonus_evidence.claim_boundary: AVX-512/AMX flags were detected on the C3 Xeon host, and WearEdge route, Docker/Qdrant, OPEA-compatible embedding, and official OPEA TEI workloads passed on that host class. This is application-level effective-use evidence, not oneDNN/TEI microkernel dispatch proof or production LLM acceleration.

bonus_evidence.cloud_run: Google Cloud C3 c3-standard-4 in us-central1-a, single node, 4 vCPU, 16 GiB RAM, no GPU, temporary VM wearedge-docker-e2e-0527082214 deleted after run
bonus_evidence.claim_boundary: Fresh-clone Docker/Qdrant E2E passed for the deterministic demo profile. This is not a production LLM or production embedding acceleration claim.

bonus_evidence.category: GCP C3 OPEA-compatible embedding profile E2E
bonus_evidence.cloud_run: Google Cloud C3 c3-standard-4 in us-central1-a, single node, 4 vCPU, 16 GiB RAM, no GPU, temporary VM wearedge-opea-profile-0527085558 deleted after run
bonus_evidence.claim_boundary: Fresh-clone OPEA-compatible embedding profile E2E passed. This validates a microservice boundary, not production TEI embedding quality or LLM acceleration.

bonus_evidence.cloud_run: Google Cloud C3 c3-standard-4 in us-central1-a, single node, 4 vCPU, 16 GiB RAM, no GPU, temporary VM wearedge-opea-tei-0527103938 deleted after run
bonus_evidence.claim_boundary: Official OPEA TEI embedding path passed local Docker Desktop and Google Cloud C3 fresh-clone E2E. This does not claim production LLM acceleration.

Known competitive risks are mitigated and documented. This does not guarantee a prize, but it gives judges direct evidence for OPEA depth, LLM readiness, data provenance, upstream contribution readiness, and Manufacturing scope.

component_map.submission_claim: Five-agent browser/API entry point with Web Demo Console, health, demo, infer, suite, and scorecard routes
Coordinates route selection, RAG, LLM adapter, evaluator, guardrails, and action cards
Defines maintenance, IQC, changeover, WI, and hazard route contracts

component_map.wear_edge_component: Route-specific knowledge loader and chunk builder
component_map.submission_claim: Prepares maintenance KB, quality plan, changeover checklist, WI, and hazard policy for retrieval

component_map.wear_edge_component: Deterministic hashing path, OPEA-compatible embedding microservice, and official OPEA TEI profile
component_map.submission_claim: Runnable no-download embedding profile plus an official OPEA TEI profile that connects Hugging Face TEI, OPEA embedding microservice, Qdrant, and the five manufacturing routes; local and Google Cloud C3 fresh-clone evidence are included
Qdrant collections are created per route; in-memory fallback keeps local demo runnable
Retrieves route-specific source snippets before action-card generation

component_map.wear_edge_component: Deterministic no-model path plus OpenAI/OPEA-compatible LLM adapter and benchmark harness
component_map.submission_claim: Local demo is deterministic by default; the submitted runtime can call an OpenAI/OPEA-compatible chat-completions endpoint and benchmark endpoint latency/fallback status when configured

component_map.wear_edge_component: Route-specific action map, blocked claims, and human gate
component_map.submission_claim: Blocks unsupported maintenance, quality, restart, release, and safety-clearance claims

component_map.wear_edge_component: Deterministic evaluator, five-agent scorecard, and GenAIEval-compatible evaluation pack
component_map.submission_claim: Reports latency, contract, guardrail, RAG/source match, action target correctness, route isolation, and a 15-case GenAIEval-compatible evaluation/benchmark artifact set
